meta.name: graph-eval-production-v1
meta.description: Curated production benchmark v1 — 100+ real-world query patterns against the synthetic knowledge graph. Tests all intent classes, edge cases, and multi-hop traversals. This is the permanent regression benchmark; every release evaluates against exactly the same dataset.

categories.blocking: Dependency and blocking queries ('What blocks X?', 'What does Y need?')
categories.who: Person resolution queries ('Who works on X?', 'Who is assigned to Y?')
categories.working_on: Work allocation queries ('What is X working on?', 'What projects is Y assigned to?')
categories.general: General connection queries ('What is connected to X?', 'Show me relations for Y')
categories.multi_intent: Queries that could match multiple intents or require intent disambiguation
categories.edge: Edge cases: empty results, quality gates, no-outgoing-edges, stale nodes
